aboutStudents.title: About Students (2-Window)
aboutStudents.description: Detailed information about the student will be displayed here.

aboutUs.title: Building the next-generation education platform together.
aboutUs.description1: We started from a simple observation: most language learning centers and platforms are either boring or too limited for speaking practice. We built our center to completely eliminate this gap.
aboutUs.description2: Our approach combines advanced teaching methodology with a student-centered comfortable environment, allowing real-time fluent communication rather than boring memorization.
aboutUs.card1Desc: Specially designed intensive programs ensure achieving significant language scores in a short time.
aboutUs.card2Desc: The main part of classes focuses on live communication and speaking, helping to overcome the language barrier in a short time.
aboutUs.card3Desc: Individual work is carried out on each student's personal mistakes and shortcomings to lead to high results.
aboutUs.locationDesc: We are located in Uzbekistan, Bukhara city, near the "Bukhara State Medical College" complex. Our modern and cozy training center is always open for you. Come and get closely acquainted with our educational processes!
aboutUs.footerTitle: Together towards the goal, with confidence.
aboutUs.footerDesc: Our team of experienced mentors provides constant support to students, ensuring they achieve high certificates and a level of fluent communication.

footer.description: Build your future with us. Get modern professions and quality education to find your path.

home.description: Join our intensive courses based on professional teachers, live speaking clubs, and international standards right now.

mentors.sectionDesc: Professionals who will help you master English and achieve great results.

list.name: Jasurbek Sobirov
list.bio: Specialist in accent reduction and overcoming the language barrier. Conducts interactive lessons.

mentorsPage.title: Our Experienced Mentors
mentorsPage.description: Meet our specialists who provide individual attention and guide students from absolute zero to professional fluency.
mentorsPage.successToast: Your request has been successfully sent!

list.name: Ruhillo Asrorov
list.bio: Helps students starting from Zero speak fluently in a short period. CELTA certified instructor who has trained 200+ IELTS 7+ holders.

list.name: Jasurbek Sobirov
list.bio: Specialist in overcoming the language barrier and building a natural accent. Conducts lessons using engaging interactive methods.

steps.title: Start English in 3 easy steps
steps.description: The path to an international level with Optimum School of English is so easy.
steps.step1Desc: Choose a convenient course, leave your details, and register.
steps.step2Desc: Determine your knowledge level through a special test and join the matching group.
steps.step3Desc: Unlock fluent communication in a short time with live classes and speaking clubs.

about.description: The Optimum School of English team provides an engaging environment based on real communication, free from boring memorization.
about.goalDesc: Provide quality education to every student and lay the foundation for their future success.
about.teacherDesc: A team of professional teachers with international certificates and years of experience.

statistic.title: Our Students' Success Indicators
statistic.description: We analyze lesson activity, vocabulary growth, and comfortable communication levels every month.
